GN[Ladder Challenge: ecksofa(#59) vs Stephen Hubbard(#38)]
C[Stephen Hubbard: Hello from Seattle!  Have a great game!
C[ecksofa: Also a great game for you ... from Germany
C[Stephen Hubbard: Thanks!  Where in Germany?
C[ecksofa: in the very south ... near Lake Constance
C[ecksofa: Not really. Still some miles to go for the Alps.
C[ecksofa: Do you have mountains near Seattle? I always just see the city from camera views out of the Seahawks stadium.

C[Stephen Hubbard: Yes we do.  On the east is the Cascade Range and to the west are the Oympics.  They are about 2000 meters max.  But we also have a big volcano near us to the south called Mt. Rainer which is 4392 m.  It’s the second-tallest mountain in the US outside of Alaska.
Stephen Hubbard: There’s a chain of volcanoes on the west coast.
C[Stephen Hubbard: Thanks for the game!🙏

Stephen Hubbard: Have a great game!
C[Stephen Hubbard: Good move!  If I played B7 you’d catch a huge dumpling.  I hope this blocks it🤞

Stephen Hubbard: Thx!  I liked working out that last bit.  I had read it and thought I had it but you pressed hard and it would have been easy to make a fatal mistake.  I should not have passed without discussing it first.  You were certainly right to take advantage of it.  Exciting finish.  I really did not want to get in a lfight
Stephen Hubbard: Ko fight.  I think it’s a flower ko where it means everything to me.
Stephen Hubbard: And nothing to you.   So you probably would have won a ko fight.
ecksofa: If I could have started the ko fight before you took B3 then the fight could have taken long enough to surround and catch your blob around C7
ecksofa: The threats at F1, H1, T4 and L11  should have been enough
ecksofa: but nevertheless, again a very nice match .... thx
